posts.title: Speaking Part 1: tabiiy javob bering
posts.text:
🗣 Speaking Part 1: tabiiy javob bering

IELTS Speaking 4 mezon bo'yicha baholanadi (har biri 25%): Fluency & Coherence, Lexical Resource, Grammatical Range, Pronunciation.

Part 1'da imtihonchi uy, ish, hobbi haqida oddiy savol beradi. Asosiy maslahat: hech qachon bir so'z bilan javob bermang — javobni sabab yoki misol bilan kengaytiring (extend).

❓ "Do you like cooking?"
✅ "Yes, I really enjoy it, especially at weekends, because it helps me relax."

📚 Manba: British Council / IELTS.org — Speaking Band Descriptors

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Useful phrases: javobni kengaytirish
posts.text:
💬 Useful phrases: javobni kengaytirish

"PEE" usuli — Point (fikr) + Explain (sabab) + Example (misol):
• To be honest, ... — Rostini aytsam, ...
• ... , especially when ... — ayniqsa ... bo'lganda
• For instance, ... — Masalan, ...
• It depends on ... — ... ga bog'liq

Bu iboralar fikrni tabiiy bog'laydi (cohesion).

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Worked example: "Where are you from?"
posts.text:
🎯 Worked example: "Where are you from?"

❌ Zaif: "From Kokand."
✅ Kuchli (B2): "I'm from Kokand, a historic city in the Fergana Valley. It's famous for its old bazaars, and I've lived there my whole life, so I know it really well."

E'tibor bering: joy + tavsif + shaxsiy bog'lanish. 2–3 jumla yetarli.

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Bugun 3 savolga ovozli javob bering (telefon diktofoniga yozing), har biri kamida 2 jumla:
1. Do you work or study?
2. What do you do in your free time?
3. Do you prefer mornings or evenings?

💡 Useful word: fluency /ˈfluː.ən.si/ — ravonlik (gapni to'xtamasdan ayta olish)

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Task 2: 4 paragrafli struktura
posts.text:
✍️ Task 2: 4 paragrafli struktura

Eng ishonchli tuzilma — 4 paragraf:
1) Introduction — savolni o'z so'zingiz bilan qayta yozing (paraphrase) + pozitsiyangiz
2) Body 1 — birinchi asosiy fikr + tushuntirish + misol
3) Body 2 — ikkinchi asosiy fikr + tushuntirish + misol
4) Conclusion — fikrlarni qisqa xulosa qiling

2 ta yaxshi ishlangan paragraf 3 ta yarim paragrafdan yuqori baho oladi.

📚 Manba: British Council IELTS preparation

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Introduction uchun foydali iboralar
posts.text:
💬 Introduction uchun foydali iboralar

Savolni qayta yozish (paraphrase) — bir xil so'zlarni takrorlamang:
• It is often argued that ... — Ko'pincha aytiladiki, ...
• In my opinion, ... — Mening fikrimcha, ...
• This essay will discuss ... — (BUNDAN QOCHING, kuch sarflamaydi)

Eslatma: "In today's modern world" kabi yodlangan iboralar ball qo'shmaydi.

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Misol: savolni paraphrase qilish
posts.text:
🎯 Misol: savolni paraphrase qilish

❓ Savol: "Some people think students should study abroad. Do you agree?"
✅ Intro: "Many believe that completing part of one's education in another country brings real benefits. I largely agree, and this essay will explain why."

E'tibor: "study abroad" → "completing education in another country".

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Quyidagi mavzuda faqat INTRODUCTION (2 jumla) yozing:
"Many people prefer to work from home. Is this a positive or negative development?"
Savolni o'z so'zingiz bilan qayta yozing + pozitsiyangizni bering.

💡 Useful word: paraphrase /ˈpær.ə.freɪz/ — boshqacha so'z bilan qayta ifodalash

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Skimming va Scanning — farqi
posts.text:
📖 Skimming va Scanning — farqi

IELTS Reading'da 60 daqiqada 40 savol. Har so'zni o'qishga vaqt yo'q. 2 ta tezkor texnika:

• Skimming — matnni tez ko'zdan kechirib, UMUMIY mazmunni tushunish (sarlavha, birinchi jumlalar).
• Scanning — aniq ma'lumotni (ism, sana, raqam, kalit so'z) TEZ topish.

Bu ikkisini birlashtirsangiz, vaqtni tejab, aniqlikni saqlaysiz.

📚 Manba: British Council — takeielts.britishcouncil.org (Skimming and Scanning)

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Qachon qaysi texnika?
posts.text:
💬 Qachon qaysi texnika?

• Avval butun matnni 2 daqiqa SKIM qiling — har paragrafning birinchi jumlasi (topic sentence) asosiy fikrni beradi.
• Savoldagi kalit so'zlarni belgilang (underline keywords).
• Keyin shu kalit so'zni matndan SCAN qilib toping.
• Topgan joyingizni diqqat bilan o'qib, javobni tasdiqlang.

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Maslahat: kalit so'z turlari
posts.text:
🎯 Maslahat: kalit so'z turlari

Scanning'da bularni izlang — ular matnda o'zgarmaydi:
• Names — ismlar (katta harf)
• Dates / numbers — sana, raqam
• Places — joy nomlari
Lekin oddiy so'zlar matnda SINONIM bilan berilishi mumkin: "car" → "vehicle". Shuning uchun ma'noga e'tibor bering, faqat so'zga emas.

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Istalgan inglizcha yangilik maqolasini oching:
1. 2 daqiqada SKIM qiling — nima haqida ekanini 1 jumlada yozing.
2. Maqoladan 3 ta raqam yoki ismni SCAN qilib toping (vaqtni belgilang).

💡 Useful word: skim /skɪm/ — tez ko'zdan kechirish, yuzaki o'qish

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Map labelling: xaritani belgilash
posts.text:
🎧 Map labelling: xaritani belgilash

Listening'da xarita yoki plan beriladi va siz eshitgan joylarni belgilab borasiz. Asosiy qoida: audio odatda CHAPDAN O'NGGA yoki SOAT MILI bo'yicha harakatlanadi.

Maslahat: audio boshlanishidan oldin xaritani ko'rib chiqing — kirish (entrance), kompas (N/S/E/W) va allaqachon belgilangan joylarni toping.

📚 Manba: IELTS.org — "10 tips for map/plan questions"

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Yo'nalish iboralari (directions)
posts.text:
💬 Yo'nalish iboralari (directions)

Bularni quloq bilan taning:
• opposite — qarshisida
• next to / beside — yonida
• at the end of — oxirida
• turn left / right — chapga / o'ngga buriling
• in the north-east corner — shimoli-sharqiy burchakda
• go past — ... yonidan o'ting

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Strategiya: "sayohat" usuli
posts.text:
🎯 Strategiya: "sayohat" usuli

Xaritani SAYOHAT deb tasavvur qiling — go'yo o'sha joyda yurib borayotgandek. So'zlovchini "kuzatib" boring.

Agar bir javobni o'tkazib yuborsangiz — TO'XTAB QOLMANG. Keyingisiga o'ting, audio sizni kutmaydi. Oxirida aqlli taxmin qilishingiz mumkin (noto'g'ri javob uchun ball kamaymaydi).

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

YouTube'dan "IELTS Listening map practice" qidiring va 1 ta mashqni bajaring. Yangi yo'nalish iboralarini daftaringizga yozing.

💡 Useful word: opposite /ˈɒp.ə.zɪt/ — qarshisida, ro'parasida

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Education: B2 so'zlar to'plami
posts.text:
📚 Education: B2 so'zlar to'plami

IELTS'da ta'lim mavzusi tez-tez chiqadi. B2 darajadagi foydali so'zlar:
• tuition fees /tjuˈɪʃ.ən fiːz/ — o'qish to'lovi
• scholarship /ˈskɒl.ə.ʃɪp/ — stipendiya
• curriculum /kəˈrɪk.jə.ləm/ — o'quv dasturi
• undergraduate /ˌʌn.dəˈɡrædʒ.u.ət/ — bakalavr talabasi
• lifelong learning — umrbod o'rganish

📚 Manba: Cambridge English Vocabulary in Use (Upper-Intermediate)

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Work: B2 so'zlar to'plami
posts.text:
💼 Work: B2 so'zlar to'plami

• salary /ˈsæl.ər.i/ — oylik maosh
• promotion /prəˈməʊ.ʃən/ — lavozim ko'tarilishi
• colleague /ˈkɒl.iːɡ/ — hamkasb
• deadline /ˈded.laɪn/ — muddat
• work-life balance — ish va hayot muvozanati

Maslahat: so'zni gap ichida yodlang, alohida emas.

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Collocations (so'z birikmalari)
posts.text:
🎯 Collocations (so'z birikmalari)

B2'da alohida so'z emas, BIRIKMA muhim:
• to apply for a job — ishga ariza topshirmoq
• to meet a deadline — muddatga ulgurmoq
• to gain experience — tajriba orttirmoq
• to earn a degree — diplom olmoq
Bu birikmalar tabiiy va yuqori ball oladi.

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Bugungi 10 so'zdan 5 tasini ishlatib, o'zingiz haqingizda 5 jumla yozing (ta'lim va ish).
Misol: "I hope to earn a degree and gain experience abroad."

💡 Useful word: collocation /ˌkɒl.əˈkeɪ.ʃən/ — birga ishlatiladigan so'zlar birikmasi

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Present Perfect vs Past Simple
posts.text:
🔧 Present Perfect vs Past Simple

Eng ko'p adashtiriladigan grammatika:
• Past Simple — TUGAGAN vaqt, aniq payt: yesterday, in 2020, last week.
   "I visited London in 2019."
• Present Perfect — natijasi HOZIR muhim yoki vaqt noaniq: ever, never, already, yet, since, for.
   "I have visited London." (qachonligi muhim emas)

📚 Manba: British Council — learnenglish.britishcouncil.org (Grammar)

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Signal so'zlar (belgi beruvchi so'zlar)
posts.text:
💬 Signal so'zlar (belgi beruvchi so'zlar)

Past Simple bilan: yesterday, ago, last year, in 2020, when I was young.
Present Perfect bilan: ever, never, just, already, yet, so far, recently, since 2020, for 5 years.

"since" = boshlanish nuqtasi (since Monday).
"for" = davomiylik (for 3 days).

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Misollarni solishtiring
posts.text:
🎯 Misollarni solishtiring

❌ "I have seen him yesterday." (yesterday — tugagan vaqt!)
✅ "I saw him yesterday."
✅ "I have already seen that film." (vaqt noaniq, natija muhim)
✅ "She has lived here for ten years." (hali ham yashaydi)
✅ "She lived there for ten years." (endi yashamaydi)

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

To'g'ri shaklni tanlang:
1. I ___ (finish) my homework. Can we go now?
2. We ___ (go) to Samarkand last summer.
3. He ___ (not / eat) sushi before.
(Javob: 1 have finished, 2 went, 3 has not eaten)

💡 Useful word: experience /ɪkˈspɪə.ri.əns/ — tajriba (Have you ever...? bilan ishlating)

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Hafta 1: nimalarni o'rgandik?
posts.text:
🔁 Hafta 1: nimalarni o'rgandik?

✅ Speaking — javobni kengaytirish (PEE: Point + Explain + Example)
✅ Writing — Task 2 ning 4 paragrafli strukturasi
✅ Reading — Skimming va Scanning
✅ Listening — Map labelling (yo'nalish iboralari)
✅ Vocabulary — Education & Work so'zlari
✅ Grammar — Present Perfect vs Past Simple

Bugun takrorlaymiz va sinab ko'ramiz!

#review #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Mini-test: Grammar
posts.text:
🎯 Mini-test: Grammar

To'g'ri shaklni tanlang:
1. She ___ (live) in Tashkent since 2018.
2. We ___ (watch) a great film last night.
3. ___ you ever ___ (try) plov?

(Javoblarni 18:00 postida tekshiring)

#review #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Mini-test: Vocabulary
posts.text:
🎯 Mini-test: Vocabulary

To'g'ri so'zni qo'ying (apply / deadline / scholarship / colleague):
1. I missed the ___ for the report.
2. She won a ___ to study in the UK.
3. I want to ___ for that job.
4. My ___ helped me finish the project.

#review #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Javoblar + Useful word
posts.text:
✅ Javoblar + Useful word

Grammar: 1 has lived, 2 watched, 3 Have...tried
Vocabulary: 1 deadline, 2 scholarship, 3 apply, 4 colleague

Nechta to'g'ri? 🎉 Izohda yozing!
Speaking mashqi: "What did you do last weekend?" — 4 jumlada ovozli javob bering.

💡 Useful word: revise /rɪˈvaɪz/ — takrorlamoq, qayta ko'rib chiqmoq

#review #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Part 2: Cue card (1-2 daqiqa gapirish)
posts.text:
🗣 Part 2: Cue card (1-2 daqiqa gapirish)

Sizga karta (cue card) beriladi: mavzu + 3-4 yo'naltiruvchi savol. 1 daqiqa tayyorgarlik (yozish mumkin), keyin 1-2 daqiqa to'xtamasdan gapirasiz.

Maslahat: tayyorgarlik daqiqasida har bandga 2-3 ta KALIT SO'Z yozing — to'liq jumla emas.

📚 Manba: IELTS.org — Speaking Part 2 format

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Vaqtni cho'zish iboralari
posts.text:
💬 Vaqtni cho'zish iboralari

Gapni davom ettirish uchun:
• What I'd like to talk about is ... — Men gapirmoqchi bo'lgan narsa ...
• The reason I chose this is ... — Buni tanlash sababim ...
• It reminds me of ... — Bu menga ... ni eslatadi
• Looking back, ... — Orqaga nazar tashlasam, ...

Bu iboralar fikrlash uchun vaqt beradi.

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Misol cue card
posts.text:
🎯 Misol cue card

"Describe a person who inspired you."
You should say: who they are / how you know them / what they did / why they inspired you.

Struktura: 1) Kim → 2) Qachondan tanish → 3) Nima qildi → 4) Nega ilhomlantirdi (eng ko'p shu yerga vaqt).
Hikoya tarzida gapiring — bu tabiiy ravonlik beradi.

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Cue card: "Describe a place you like to visit."
1 daqiqa tayyorlaning (kalit so'zlar), keyin 1.5 daqiqa ovozli gapiring va o'zingizni eshiting.

💡 Useful word: inspire /ɪnˈspaɪər/ — ilhomlantirmoq, ruhlantirmoq

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Task 1: grafik/jadval tasvirlash
posts.text:
✍️ Task 1: grafik/jadval tasvirlash

Academic Task 1'da grafik, jadval yoki diagramma beriladi (kamida 150 so'z). Sizning vazifangiz — FIKR bildirmasdan, asosiy ma'lumotni tasvirlash.

Struktura:
1) Introduction — grafik nimani ko'rsatishini paraphrase qiling
2) Overview — eng muhim 2-3 tendensiya (umumiy manzara)
3-4) Details — raqamlar bilan tafsilot

📚 Manba: British Council IELTS — Academic Writing Task 1

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Tendensiya (trend) iboralari
posts.text:
💬 Tendensiya (trend) iboralari

O'sish: increase, rise, grow, climb, surge
Kamayish: decrease, fall, decline, drop, plummet
Barqaror: remain stable, stay constant, level off
Tezlik: sharply (keskin), gradually (asta-sekin), slightly (biroz)

Misol: "Sales rose sharply between 2020 and 2022."

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Overview — eng muhim qism
posts.text:
🎯 Overview — eng muhim qism

Overview'da RAQAM yozmang — faqat umumiy manzara:
✅ "Overall, the number of users increased over the period, while costs fell."
Examiner avval Overview'ni qidiradi. Yaxshi overview = yuqori ball (Task Achievement).

Solishtirish uchun: while, whereas, compared to, in contrast.

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Tasavvur qiling: grafik 2010-2020 oralig'ida internet foydalanuvchilari 20%dan 80%gacha o'sgan. 1 ta OVERVIEW jumlasi yozing (raqamsiz).
Misol: "Overall, internet use rose significantly over the decade."

💡 Useful word: trend /trend/ — tendensiya, yo'nalish

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: True / False / Not Given
posts.text:
📖 True / False / Not Given

Bu eng qiyin savol turi. Ma'nosi:
• TRUE — gap matndagi ma'lumotга MOS keladi
• FALSE — gap matnga ZID (qarama-qarshi)
• NOT GIVEN — matnda bu haqda HECH narsa yo'q

Eng katta xato: o'z bilimingizga tayanish. Faqat MATNGA qarang.

📚 Manba: British Council IELTS — Reading question types

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: FALSE va NOT GIVEN farqi
posts.text:
💬 FALSE va NOT GIVEN farqi

• FALSE — matn TESKARISINI aytadi.
   Gap: "The museum is free." Matn: "Entry costs $5." → FALSE
• NOT GIVEN — matn bu haqda gapirmaydi.
   Gap: "The museum is popular." Matn narx haqida gapiradi, mashhurlik haqida emas → NOT GIVEN

Ma'lumot YO'Q bo'lsa = NOT GIVEN.

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Strategiya
posts.text:
🎯 Strategiya

1. Gapdagi kalit so'zni belgilang.
2. Matndan o'sha qismni scan qiling.
3. Gapni matn bilan diqqat bilan solishtiring.
4. "all, always, never, only" kabi mutlaq so'zlarga ehtiyot bo'ling — ko'pincha FALSE bo'ladi.
5. Savollar matn tartibida keladi.

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Matn: "Tea was first grown in China. Today it is popular worldwide."
Aniqlang (T/F/NG):
1. Tea originated in China. →
2. Tea is only drunk in Asia. →
3. Tea is the healthiest drink. →
(Javob: 1 True, 2 False, 3 Not Given)

💡 Useful word: state /steɪt/ — bayon qilmoq, aytmoq (the text states ...)

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Multiple choice: to'g'ri javobni tanlash
posts.text:
🎧 Multiple choice: to'g'ri javobni tanlash

3 ta variant (A, B, C) beriladi, bittasi to'g'ri. Qiyinligi: barcha variantlar audioda eshitiladi, lekin faqat bittasi savolga to'liq javob beradi.

Maslahat: audio boshlanishidan oldin savol va variantlarni o'qib oling (kalit so'zlarni belgilang).

📚 Manba: British Council IELTS — Listening tips

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: "Tuzoq"lardan ehtiyot bo'ling
posts.text:
💬 "Tuzoq"lardan ehtiyot bo'ling

So'zlovchi ko'pincha noto'g'ri variantni aytib, KEYIN tuzatadi:
"I was going to take the bus, but actually I decided to walk."
→ Javob: walk (bus emas!)

Belgi so'zlar: but, however, actually, in fact, on second thoughts — bulardan KEYIN to'g'ri javob keladi.

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Strategiya: paraphrase
posts.text:
🎯 Strategiya: paraphrase

Audioda savoldagi aynan o'sha so'zlar EMAS, sinonim ishlatiladi:
Savol: "expensive" → Audio: "costs a lot / pricey"
Shuning uchun MA'NONI tinglang, faqat so'zni emas. Variantlarni eshitilish tartibi bo'yicha emas, MA'NOSI bo'yicha belgilang.

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Inglizcha podkast yoki video oching (subtitrsiz). 1 daqiqa tinglab, "but / actually / however" so'zlaridan keyin nima aytilganini yozib oling.

💡 Useful word: actually /ˈæk.tʃu.ə.li/ — aslida, haqiqatda (ko'pincha to'g'ri javobdan oldin keladi)

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Environment: B2 so'zlar
posts.text:
📚 Environment: B2 so'zlar

IELTS'da ekologiya juda tez-tez chiqadi:
• climate change /ˈklaɪ.mət tʃeɪndʒ/ — iqlim o'zgarishi
• pollution /pəˈluː.ʃən/ — ifloslanish
• renewable energy — qayta tiklanadigan energiya
• carbon emissions — uglerod chiqindilari
• sustainable /səˈsteɪ.nə.bəl/ — barqaror, ekologik toza

📚 Manba: Cambridge English Vocabulary in Use (Upper-Intermediate)

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Technology: B2 so'zlar
posts.text:
💻 Technology: B2 so'zlar

• artificial intelligence (AI) — sun'iy intellekt
• device /dɪˈvaɪs/ — qurilma
• innovation /ˌɪn.əˈveɪ.ʃən/ — yangilik, ixtiro
• cybersecurity — kiberxavfsizlik
• automation /ˌɔː.təˈmeɪ.ʃən/ — avtomatlashtirish

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Collocations
posts.text:
🎯 Collocations

• to reduce pollution — ifloslanishni kamaytirmoq
• to tackle climate change — iqlim o'zgarishiga qarshi kurashmoq
• to rely on technology — texnologiyaga tayanmoq
• to protect the environment — atrof-muhitni himoya qilmoq
Bu birikmalarni Writing va Speaking'da ishlating.

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Mavzu: "Texnologiya atrof-muhitга qanday yordam beradi?" — bugungi so'zlardan foydalanib 3 jumla yozing.
Misol: "Renewable energy can reduce carbon emissions and tackle climate change."

💡 Useful word: sustainable /səˈsteɪ.nə.bəl/ — barqaror (kelajakka zarar bermaydigan)

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Conditionals: 1, 2, 3-tip
posts.text:
🔧 Conditionals: 1, 2, 3-tip

• Zero — har doim haqiqat: If you heat ice, it melts.
• First (1) — real kelajak: If it rains, I will stay home.
• Second (2) — xayoliy hozir/kelajak: If I were rich, I would travel.
• Third (3) — o'tmishdagi afsus: If I had studied, I would have passed.

📚 Manba: British Council — learnenglish.britishcouncil.org (Conditionals)

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Struktura (formula)
posts.text:
💬 Struktura (formula)

• 1-tip: If + Present Simple, ... will + verb
• 2-tip: If + Past Simple, ... would + verb
• 3-tip: If + Past Perfect, ... would have + V3

Eslatma: 2-tipda "I were" ishlatiladi ("I was" emas): If I were you...

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Qaysi tip?
posts.text:
🎯 Qaysi tip?

• Real, ehtimoliy → 1-tip: "If I have time, I'll call you."
• Xayoliy, ehtimoldan uzoq → 2-tip: "If I won the lottery, I'd buy a house."
• O'tmish, o'zgartirib bo'lmaydi → 3-tip: "If she had left earlier, she wouldn't have missed the train."

Speaking'da 2 va 3-tip yuqori grammatik darajani ko'rsatadi.

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

To'g'ri shaklni qo'ying:
1. If I ___ (be) you, I would apologise.
2. If it ___ (rain) tomorrow, we will cancel.
3. If they had known, they ___ (come).
(Javob: 1 were, 2 rains, 3 would have come)

💡 Useful word: would /wʊd/ — bo'lardi (2 va 3-tip shart gaplarda)

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Hafta 2: takrorlash
posts.text:
🔁 Hafta 2: takrorlash

✅ Speaking — Part 2 cue card (kalit so'z bilan tayyorgarlik)
✅ Writing — Task 1 grafik + Overview
✅ Reading — True / False / Not Given
✅ Listening — Multiple choice (tuzoqlar)
✅ Vocabulary — Environment & Technology
✅ Grammar — Conditionals (1, 2, 3-tip)

Bugun sinab ko'ramiz!

posts.title: Mini-test: Conditionals
posts.text:
🎯 Mini-test: Conditionals

To'g'ri shaklni tanlang:
1. If I ___ (have) more time, I would learn the piano.
2. If you heat water to 100°C, it ___ (boil).
3. If she ___ (study) harder, she would have passed.

(Javoblar 18:00 da)

#review #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Mini-test: Reading (T/F/NG)
posts.text:
🎯 Mini-test: Reading (T/F/NG)

Matn: "Electric cars produce no exhaust fumes. They are becoming more common in cities."
1. Electric cars create exhaust gases. →
2. Electric cars are increasing in cities. →
3. Electric cars are cheaper than petrol cars. →

#review #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Javoblar + Useful word
posts.text:
✅ Javoblar + Useful word

Conditionals: 1 had, 2 boils, 3 had studied
Reading: 1 False, 2 True, 3 Not Given

Speaking mashqi: cue card "Describe a useful gadget you own" — 1.5 daqiqa ovozli gapiring.

💡 Useful word: review /rɪˈvjuː/ — ko'rib chiqmoq, takrorlamoq

#review #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Part 3: chuqur muhokama
posts.text:
🗣 Part 3: chuqur muhokama

Part 3'da Part 2 mavzusi bo'yicha ABSTRAKT, umumiy savollar beriladi ("Why do people...?", "How will... change?"). Bu yerda fikr, sabab va misol talab qilinadi.

Maslahat: javobni kengaytiring — fikr + sabab + misol + qarama-qarshi tomon.

📚 Manba: IELTS.org — Speaking Part 3 format

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Fikr bildirish iboralari
posts.text:
💬 Fikr bildirish iboralari

• I would argue that ... — Men shunday deb hisoblayman ...
• It seems to me that ... — Menimcha ...
• On the one hand ... on the other hand ... — Bir tomondan ... boshqa tomondan ...
• That said, ... — Shunga qaramay, ...
• There's no doubt that ... — Shubhasiz ...

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Misol javob
posts.text:
🎯 Misol javob

❓ "Why do some people prefer to live in cities?"
✅ "Well, I'd argue the main reason is opportunity. Cities offer better jobs and education. For example, most universities are in big cities. That said, some people find them too crowded and stressful."

Struktura: fikr → sabab → misol → qarama-qarshi.

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Quyidagi savolga 30 soniya ovozli javob bering (fikr + sabab + misol):
"Do you think online learning will replace traditional schools?"

💡 Useful word: argue /ˈɑːɡ.juː/ — fikr bildirmoq, dalil keltirmoq (I would argue that...)

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Coherence & Cohesion nima?
posts.text:
✍️ Coherence & Cohesion nima?

Bu Writing'ning 25% baliga teng mezon.
• Coherence — fikrlar mantiqiy tartibda joylashishi.
• Cohesion — fikrlarni bog'lovchi so'zlar (linking words) bilan ulash.

Yaxshi struktura + to'g'ri bog'lovchilar = examiner matnni oson o'qiydi = yuqori ball.

📚 Manba: British Council IELTS — Writing Band Descriptors

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Linking words (bog'lovchilar)
posts.text:
💬 Linking words (bog'lovchilar)

• Qo'shish: moreover, in addition, furthermore
• Qarama-qarshilik: however, on the other hand, nevertheless
• Sabab: because, since, due to
• Natija: therefore, as a result, consequently
• Misol: for example, for instance, such as

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Maslahat: o'lchovni saqlang
posts.text:
🎯 Maslahat: o'lchovni saqlang

❌ Har jumlada bog'lovchi = sun'iy va og'ir.
✅ Har paragrafda 2-3 ta tabiiy bog'lovchi yetarli.

Pronoun bilan ham bog'lang: "Pollution is rising. THIS affects health." ("this" — takrorni kamaytiradi).

Har paragraf bitta asosiy fikr (topic sentence) bilan boshlansin.

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

2 jumlani 1 ta bog'lovchi bilan ulang:
"Public transport is cheap. It reduces traffic."
Misol: "Public transport is cheap; moreover, it reduces traffic."

💡 Useful word: however /haʊˈev.ər/ — biroq, lekin (qarama-qarshilikni ko'rsatadi)

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Matching headings
posts.text:
📖 Matching headings

Sizga sarlavhalar ro'yxati beriladi, ularni paragraflarga moslashtirasiz. Sarlavha — paragrafning ASOSIY g'oyasi (main idea), tafsilot emas.

Maslahat: avval butun paragrafni o'qing, keyin "Bu paragraf ASOSAN nima haqida?" deb so'rang.

📚 Manba: British Council IELTS — Reading question types

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Asosiy g'oya vs tafsilot
posts.text:
💬 Asosiy g'oya vs tafsilot

Eng katta xato: paragrafda bitta so'z sarlavhada bor deb, darrov tanlash. Bu "tuzoq".

✅ Sarlavha butun paragrafni qamrab olishi kerak, faqat 1 jumlani emas.
Topic sentence odatda paragraf BOSHIDA yoki OXIRIDA bo'ladi.

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Strategiya
posts.text:
🎯 Strategiya

1. Sarlavhalar soni paragraflardan ko'p — hammasi ishlatilmaydi.
2. Avval o'zingiz ishongan (oson) paragraflarni belgilang.
3. Ishlatilgan sarlavhani o'chirib boring (qaytib ishlatilmaydi).
4. Qiyinlari oxirida — qolgan variantlardan tanlang.

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Inglizcha maqola oching. Har paragrafga O'ZINGIZ 3-4 so'zli sarlavha o'ylab toping. Bu "asosiy g'oyani topish" ko'nikmasini mashq qiladi.

💡 Useful word: heading /ˈhed.ɪŋ/ — sarlavha, mavzu nomi

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Form / Gap completion
posts.text:
🎧 Form / Gap completion

Section 1'da odatda forma to'ldiriladi: ism, manzil, telefon, sana, narx. Bu yerda IMLO (spelling) va RAQAM aniqligi muhim.

Maslahat: so'z chegarasiga e'tibor bering — "NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS" desa, 3 so'z yozsangiz, javob noto'g'ri hisoblanadi.

📚 Manba: British Council IELTS — Listening tips

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Imlo (spelling) — harflarni taning
posts.text:
💬 Imlo (spelling) — harflarni taning

Telefonda harf aytilganda taning:
• "double L" — ikkita L
• G/J, B/V/P, M/N — ko'pincha adashtiriladi
• Sanalar: "the third of May" = 3 May
• Raqam: "fifteen" (15) va "fifty" (50) — urg'uга e'tibor bering!

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Strategiya
posts.text:
🎯 Strategiya

1. Bo'sh joydan oldin/keyin so'zni o'qing — javob TURI (raqam? ism? narsa?) ni bashorat qiling.
2. Faqat eshitganingizni yozing, taxmin qilmang.
3. Imloda xato = ball yo'q. Oddiy so'zlarni to'g'ri yozishni mashq qiling.
4. Birlik/ko'plik (-s) ham muhim.

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Do'stingizdan inglizcha 5 ta so'zni harflab aytishini so'rang (yoki audio toping). Yozib oling, keyin tekshiring. Raqamlarni ham mashq qiling: 13/30, 14/40, 15/50.

💡 Useful word: spell /spel/ — harflab aytmoq (How do you spell it?)

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Health: B2 so'zlar
posts.text:
📚 Health: B2 so'zlar

• immune system /ɪˈmjuːn/ — immunitet tizimi
• balanced diet — muvozanatli ovqatlanish
• mental health — ruhiy salomatlik
• well-being /ˌwelˈbiː.ɪŋ/ — farovonlik, salomatlik
• prevention /prɪˈven.ʃən/ — oldini olish

📚 Manba: Cambridge English Vocabulary in Use (Upper-Intermediate)

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Lifestyle: B2 so'zlar
posts.text:
🏃 Lifestyle: B2 so'zlar

• sedentary lifestyle /ˈsed.ən.tər.i/ — kam harakatli turmush tarzi
• work-life balance — ish-hayot muvozanati
• stress management — stressni boshqarish
• habit /ˈhæb.ɪt/ — odat
• routine /ruːˈtiːn/ — kundalik tartib

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Collocations
posts.text:
🎯 Collocations

• to stay fit — sog'lom bo'lib qolmoq
• to lead a healthy lifestyle — sog'lom turmush kechirmoq
• to take up a sport — sport bilan shug'ullana boshlamoq
• to reduce stress — stressni kamaytirmoq
• to break a bad habit — yomon odatni tashlamoq

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

"Sog'lom bo'lib qolish uchun nima qilasiz?" — bugungi so'zlardan 4 tasini ishlatib javob yozing.
Misol: "To stay fit, I follow a balanced diet and try to reduce stress."

💡 Useful word: well-being /ˌwelˈbiː.ɪŋ/ — jismoniy va ruhiy farovonlik

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Passive Voice nima?
posts.text:
🔧 Passive Voice nima?

Harakat KIM tomonidan emas, NIMA bo'lganligi muhim bo'lganda ishlatiladi.
• Active: "They built the bridge in 1990."
• Passive: "The bridge was built in 1990."

Formula: be + V3 (past participle).
IELTS Writing Task 1 va rasmiy yozuvда juda foydali.

📚 Manba: British Council — learnenglish.britishcouncil.org (Passive)

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Zamonlarda passive
posts.text:
💬 Zamonlarda passive

• Present: is/are + V3 → "English is spoken here."
• Past: was/were + V3 → "It was made in Japan."
• Present Perfect: has/have been + V3 → "The work has been done."
• Modal: can/will be + V3 → "It can be improved."

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Qachon ishlatish kerak?
posts.text:
🎯 Qachon ishlatish kerak?

• Harakat bajaruvchisi noma'lum yoki muhim emas: "My bike was stolen."
• Jarayon (process) tasvirlash: "The beans are roasted, then ground."
• Rasmiy/akademik uslub: "It is believed that ..."

⚠️ Haddan tashqari ishlatmang — Speaking'da active ko'proq tabiiy.

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Passive'ga aylantiring:
1. "Someone cleans the office every day." →
2. "They will announce the results tomorrow." →
(Javob: 1 The office is cleaned every day. 2 The results will be announced tomorrow.)

💡 Useful word: produce /prəˈdjuːs/ — ishlab chiqarmoq (is produced — passive)

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Hafta 3: takrorlash
posts.text:

✅ Speaking — Part 3 muhokama (fikr + sabab + misol)
✅ Writing — Coherence & Cohesion (linking words)
✅ Reading — Matching headings (asosiy g'oya)

Bugun mashq qilamiz!

#review #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Mini-test: Passive
posts.text:
🎯 Mini-test: Passive

Passive'ga aylantiring:
1. "People speak English all over the world." →
2. "Someone has eaten my lunch." →
3. "They are building a new school." →

(Javoblar 18:00 da)

#review #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Mini-test: Linking words
posts.text:
🎯 Mini-test: Linking words

Bo'shliqni to'ldiring (however / therefore / for example):
1. It was raining; ___, we stayed inside.
2. Many sports are healthy, ___ swimming and running.
3. He studied hard; ___, he passed easily.

#review #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Javoblar + Useful word
posts.text:
✅ Javoblar + Useful word

Passive: 1 English is spoken all over the world. 2 My lunch has been eaten. 3 A new school is being built.
Linking: 1 therefore, 2 for example, 3 therefore

Speaking: "How can people improve their health?" — 30 soniya javob bering.

💡 Useful word: improve /ɪmˈpruːv/ — yaxshilamoq, rivojlantirmoq

#review #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Pronunciation: 25% bal
posts.text:
🗣 Pronunciation: 25% bal

Talaffuz Speaking'ning 4 mezonidan biri. Toza aksent shart EMAS — muhimi TUSHUNARLI bo'lish.

3 ta asosiy element:
• Word stress — so'zdagi urg'u
• Sentence stress — gapdagi muhim so'zlarni ajratish
• Intonation — ohang (ko'tarilish/pasayish)

📚 Manba: British Council / IELTS.org — Pronunciation

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Word stress (so'z urg'usi)
posts.text:
💬 Word stress (so'z urg'usi)

Noto'g'ri urg'u ma'noni o'zgartiradi:
• PREsent (sovg'a) ≠ preSENT (taqdim etmoq)
• REcord (yozuv) ≠ reCORD (yozib olmoq)
• phoTOgraphy — urg'u 2-bo'g'inda

Lug'atda urg'u belgisi ( ' ) ko'rsatiladi. Yangi so'zni urg'usi bilan yodlang.

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Intonation (ohang)
posts.text:
🎯 Intonation (ohang)

• Yes/No savol → ohang KO'TARILADI: "Do you like it? ↗"
• Wh- savol → ohang PASAYADI: "Where do you live? ↘"
• Ro'yxat → har bandda ko'tariladi, oxirida pasayadi.

Bir xil ("flat") ohangda gapirish zerikarli eshitiladi va ball pasaytiradi.

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

"Shadowing" mashqi: inglizcha 30 soniyalik videoni tinglab, so'zlovchining ohangini TAQLID qilib takrorlang. Ovozingizni yozib, solishtiring.

💡 Useful word: stress /stres/ — urg'u (so'zda kuchli aytiladigan bo'g'in)

#speaking #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Opinion essay (Agree/Disagree)
posts.text:
✍️ Opinion essay (Agree/Disagree)

"To what extent do you agree or disagree?" — eng ko'p uchraydigan Task 2 turi.

Qoida: pozitsiyangiz AYDIN bo'lsin. Introduction'da pozitsiyani ayting va butun inshoda unga sodiq qoling.

Struktura: Intro (pozitsiya) → 2 ta sabab paragraf → Conclusion.

📚 Manba: British Council IELTS — Writing Task 2

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Pozitsiya iboralari
posts.text:
💬 Pozitsiya iboralari

• I completely agree that ... — To'liq qo'shilaman ...
• I partly agree, but ... — Qisman qo'shilaman, lekin ...
• In my view, the benefits outweigh the drawbacks — Menimcha, foydasi zararidan ko'p
• While some believe ..., I would argue ... — Ba'zilar ... deb hisoblasa-da, men ...

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Argumentni rivojlantirish (PEEL)
posts.text:
🎯 Argumentni rivojlantirish (PEEL)

Har body paragraf:
• Point — asosiy fikr (topic sentence)
• Explain — nega? tushuntiring
• Example — misol keltiring
• Link — fikrni mavzuga bog'lang

Misol: "Firstly, technology saves time. By automating tasks, workers can focus on creative work. For instance, software now handles accounting. This boosts productivity."

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Mavzu: "Some people think exams are the best way to assess students. Do you agree?"
Faqat 1 ta BODY paragraf yozing (PEEL: Point + Explain + Example + Link).

💡 Useful word: outweigh /ˌaʊtˈweɪ/ — ustun kelmoq, og'irroq bo'lmoq (benefits outweigh drawbacks)

#writing #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Vaqt boshqaruvi: 60 daqiqa, 40 savol
posts.text:
📖 Vaqt boshqaruvi: 60 daqiqa, 40 savol

3 ta matn, har biriga ~20 daqiqa. Ko'p o'quvchi vaqt yetishmay qoladi.

Asosiy qoida: bitta savolga 1.5 daqiqadan ortiq sarflamang. Qийин savolni belgilab, KEYINGISIGA o'ting — oxirida qайtib kelasiz.

📚 Manba: British Council IELTS — Reading test tips

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Tartib strategiyasi
posts.text:
💬 Tartib strategiyasi

1. Avval SAVOLLARNI o'qing, keyin matnni.
2. Oson savollardan boshlang (gap-fill, ism-sana).
3. Matnni boshdan-oxir o'qimang — kerakli joyni SCAN qiling.
4. Har javobni daftar emas, JAVOB VARAQASIga ko'chiring (vaqt tejaydi).

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Bo'sh qoldirmang!
posts.text:
🎯 Bo'sh qoldirmang!

Noto'g'ri javob uchun ball KAMAYMAYDI. Shuning uchun:
• Bilmasangiz ham — taxmin qiling.
• T/F/NG da bo'sh qolsa, "Not Given" yozing.
• Multiple choice'da eng mantiqiy variantni tanlang.
Har bir savol = 1 ball, qiyin va oson teng.

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Taymer qo'ying: 1 ta IELTS reading passage'ni 20 daqiqada bajaring (13-14 savol). Vaqtni his qilish — bu eng muhim mashq.

💡 Useful word: skip /skɪp/ — o'tkazib yubormoq (skip a difficult question)

#reading #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Turli aksentlar
posts.text:
🎧 Turli aksentlar

IELTS Listening turli aksentlardan foydalanadi: Britan, Amerika, Avstraliya, Kanada. Bu o'quvchilarni hayron qoldiradi.

Yechim: turli aksentlarni MUNTAZAM tinglang — BBC (Britan), CNN (Amerika), ABC (Avstraliya). Quloq o'rganadi.

📚 Manba: British Council IELTS — Listening tips

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Javobni oldindan bashorat qilish
posts.text:
💬 Javobni oldindan bashorat qilish

Audio boshlanishidan oldin savolni o'qib, JAVOB TURINI bashorat qiling:
• "___ people attended" → RAQAM kerak
• "It is made of ___" → MATERIAL kerak
• "The meeting is on ___" → SANA/KUN kerak

Bu sizni tayyor holatga keltiradi va xatoni kamaytiradi.

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Diqqatni saqlash
posts.text:
🎯 Diqqatni saqlash

Audio FAQAT BIR MARTA yangraydi. Shuning uchun:
• Bir javobni o'tkazsangiz, to'xtab qolmang — keyingisiga o'ting.
• Yozayotganda ham tinglashни davom ettiring.
• Section oxiridagi tekshirish vaqtidan foydalaning.

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

Bugun BBC Learning English yoki TED Talk (Britan aksenti) 3 daqiqa tinglang. Subtitrsiz. Yangi eshitilgan so'zlarni yozib oling.

💡 Useful word: predict /prɪˈdɪkt/ — oldindan aytmoq, bashorat qilmoq

#listening #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Society: B2 so'zlar
posts.text:

• community /kəˈmjuː.nə.ti/ — jamoa, hamjamiyat

posts.title: Media: B2 so'zlar
posts.text:
📱 Media: B2 so'zlar

• social media — ijtimoiy tarmoqlar
• advertisement /ədˈvɜː.tɪs.mənt/ — reklama
• influence /ˈɪn.flu.əns/ — ta'sir

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Collocations
posts.text:
🎯 Collocations

• to raise awareness — xabardorlikni oshirmoq
• to have a positive/negative impact — ijobiy/salbiy ta'sir ko'rsatmoq
• to spread information — ma'lumot tarqatmoq
• to bridge the generation gap — avlodlar farqini kamaytirmoq

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

"Ijtimoiy tarmoqlar jamiyatga qanday ta'sir qiladi?" — bugungi so'zlardan 4 tasini ishlatib 3 jumla yozing.
Misol: "Social media can spread information quickly, but it may also spread fake news."

💡 Useful word: influence /ˈɪn.flu.əns/ — ta'sir, ta'sir ko'rsatmoq

#vocabulary #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Relative clauses
posts.text:
🔧 Relative clauses

2 ta gapni 1 ta qilib bog'laydi va so'z boyligini ko'rsatadi:
• who — odam uchun: "The man who called you is here."
• which — narsa uchun: "The book which I read was great."
• that — odam/narsa (gaplashuvда): "the car that I bought"
• where — joy uchun: "the city where I was born"

📚 Manba: British Council — learnenglish.britishcouncil.org (Relative clauses)

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Defining vs Non-defining
posts.text:
💬 Defining vs Non-defining

• Defining — muhim ma'lumot, vergulsiz:
   "Students who study hard pass." (qaysi talabalar?)
• Non-defining — qo'shimcha ma'lumot, VERGUL bilan:
   "My brother, who lives in London, is a doctor."

Non-defining'da "that" ISHLATILMAYDI.

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Nega foydali?
posts.text:
🎯 Nega foydali?

Relative clauses Writing va Speaking'da grammatik darajani (Grammatical Range) oshiradi:
❌ Oddiy: "I have a friend. He speaks five languages."
✅ B2: "I have a friend who speaks five languages."

2 ta qisqa gapni 1 ta murakkab gapга birlashtiring.

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.title: Homework + Useful word
posts.text:
📝 Homework + Useful word

2 gapni 1 ta qiling (who/which/where):
1. "This is the school. I studied there." →
2. "She has a car. It is electric." →
(Javob: 1 This is the school where I studied. 2 She has a car which is electric.)

💡 Useful word: whose /huːz/ — kimning (The man whose car was stolen...)

#grammar #IELTS #B2 #EnglishFreeCourse

posts.text:

posts.title: Javoblar + Useful word
posts.text:

Grammar: 1 who, 2 which, 3 where
Vocabulary: 1 awareness, 2 fake news, 3 influence, 4 community

🎉 1 oy o'qidingiz — tabriklaymiz! Speaking: "What did you learn this month?" — 1 daqiqa ovozli javob bering.
